comment: Curated data the Open5e APIs don't carry in structured form. spell_slot_tables maps class level -> slots per spell level (identical in the 2014 and 2024 rules; warlock Pact Magic uses the same array shape with zeros below its slot level).
srd24_species_asi_desc: Ability score increases come from your background under the 2024 rules; this species grants none directly.
